---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

::: {.column-screen .gradient-banner}
::: {.container .header-container}

# Resume
### Han (Simon) Yan — Data Science & AI Assurance

:::
:::

<!-- ── 下载按钮区 ───────────────────────────── -->
::: {.resume-actions}
<a href="assets/pdf/Simon Yan.pdf" download class="resume-btn resume-btn--primary">
  ⬇ Download PDF
</a>
<a href="assets/pdf/Simon Yan.pdf" target="_blank" class="resume-btn resume-btn--secondary">
  ↗ Open in New Tab
</a>
:::

<!-- ── PDF 嵌入预览 ───────────────────────────── -->
::: {.resume-embed-wrapper}
<iframe
  src="assets/pdf/Simon Yan.pdf"
  class="resume-iframe"
  title="Simon Yan Resume"
  loading="lazy">
  <p>Your browser does not support PDF preview.
  <a href="assets/pdf/Simon Yan.pdf">Click here to download.</a></p>
</iframe>
:::

```{=html}
<style>
.resume-actions {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1.5rem 0 1rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.resume-btn {
  padding: 0.55rem 1.4rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
}

.resume-btn--primary {
  background: #1a365d;
  color: #ffffff;
  border: 2px solid #1a365d;
}

.resume-btn--primary:hover {
  background: #f6ad55;
  border-color: #f6ad55;
  color: #1a365d;
}

.resume-btn--secondary {
  background: transparent;
  color: #1a365d;
  border: 2px solid #1a365d;
}

.resume-btn--secondary:hover {
  background: #ebf4ff;
}

.resume-embed-wrapper {
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 0 auto 3rem;
  padding: 0 1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(26, 54, 93, 0.12);
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}

.resume-iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 85vh;
  min-height: 600px;
  border: none;
  display: block;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .resume-iframe {
    height: 70vh;
  }
}
</style>
```
